prompt: Edit image 1: Enhance the fly's compound eyes with the intense hexagonal detail and reflective lighting style from image 3. Apply the intricate texture and focused lighting of the face area shown in image 2 to the fly's head and mouthparts.
prompt_refined: Edit the provided close-up image of the fly (image 1). Modify its prominent compound eyes by incorporating the intense, pronounced hexagonal ommatidia pattern and the highly reflective, sharp lighting style from image 3. For the remaining areas of the fly's head, including its furry facial region and detailed mouthparts positioned below and between the eyes, apply the intricate, fine-grained texture and the soft, focused lighting conditions observed in image 2.
objects: Pronounced hexagonal ommatidia pattern on compound eyes
Highly reflective lighting on compound eyes
Fly's detailed mouthparts, positioned below and between the eyes
Intricate, fine-grained texture on facial region and mouthparts
Soft, focused lighting on facial region and mouthparts
